manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢
▢ X X ▢ ▢
X X X X X
▢ X X ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢

message.content: .DESCRIPTION: A 5x5 grid with a central vertical line of X's. Row 1: empty, empty, X, empty, empty. Row 2: empty, X, X, empty, empty. Row 3: X, X, X, X, X (full row). Row 4: empty, X, X, empty, empty. Row 5: empty, empty, X, empty, empty.
message.reasoning: We need to comply: start with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, nothing else. Provide short grid description. Should just describe the grid

reasoning_details.text: We need to comply: start with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, nothing else. Provide short grid description. Should just describe the grid
